title: Holiday/Blackout days in Timeline/Gantt Views
excerpt: It would be great if we could blackout days that we don’t want our items to be scheduled on. Major holidays and company vacation days so we don’t accidentally schedule something over one of those days.

posts.author: odelegacy (Calvin Ode)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if we could blackout days that we don’t want our items to be scheduled on. Major holidays and company vacation days so we don’t accidentally schedule something over one of those days.

posts.author: ukeidar (ukeidar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi

I encounter this gap in functionality when planning a project that is about to overlap with the upcoming holidays in IL in September

Be able to block holidays as a working days is an important feature

Udi

posts.author: Izobelle (Isabelle)
posts.cookedHtml:
I sencond this we really need this as it’s basic project management requirement!

Thanks!

posts.author: CharlotteCH (Charlotte)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, same need here, it could be great to have it to improve our plans ! Thanks !

posts.author: REG_Philip (Philip Gotzen)
posts.cookedHtml: Super important! Monday just launched this nice automation to mach items with a usercase of holiday requests. As often in monday, this only works in a simple way because we cannot define holidays. This again means a lot of work arounds or alternative solutions for HR while I am trying to convince them that monday is a great tool and should be further implemented…

posts.author: Gys (Gys de Beer)
posts.cookedHtml: Has anything further happened with being able to block out certain dates (public holidays etc) within a Project so that these are treated like weekend exclusion in the timeline and Gannt?

posts.cookedHtml:

same need for us as well

Thanks

posts.author: michaelberliner (Michael Berliner)
posts.cookedHtml:
Unimpressed that there has never been a response to this from Monday - it’s a really basic feature.

I asked a similar query via message to tech support, twice, last year, and didn’t get any response. Disappointing and makes it hard for me to justify renewal to the team.

posts.author: strykr (Adam)
posts.cookedHtml: Same need within our company. Need to blockout dates for when team members are not available, otherwise our projects are grossly understated.

posts.author: pjewkes21 (Paul Jewkes)
posts.cookedHtml: Also waiting and hoping for this feature.

posts.author: Izobelle (Isabelle)
posts.cookedHtml:
Any news on this features? We need more likes? I really need it for my projets and HR requests on calendar.

Very basic

Thhhanks!

posts.author: bake6098 (AmandaM)
posts.cookedHtml: Really basic, simple need…

posts.author: rbpereira (Rafael)
posts.cookedHtml: Our company is also in need for this feature. All our people management and project timeline is compromised without the system being able to recognize public holidays and vacation requests.

posts.author: MHaigh (Matthew Haigh)
posts.cookedHtml: Monday Dev Time *** Easy Win *** Could you add a holiday table to each user account? it could be as simple as a date column and a am/pm/allday status. When looking at the user in workload/calendar views it would be good to highlight the hols, and maybe later add the ability for items/subitems assigned to the person to be highlight, with option of extending item/subitem. Would be useful if you can also assign holidays to Teams, or be able to have specific holidays for countries (our staff are in over 10 countries, with diff hol days!)… PLEASE can you do this, or put some guidance together so people can have an easy way to implement holidays.

posts.author: Gys (Gys de Beer)
posts.cookedHtml: Still awaiting acknowledgement of my January 2022 question. No feedback from anyone at Monday.com yet. This is a simple yet URGENT request.

posts.author: Chenney (Chenney Gruber)
posts.cookedHtml: How could this have been overlooked in the development of this software? This is such a basic function that I didn’t even think to check that it was available before we decided to use Monday.com. It’s simply imperative to be able to block out non-working days to so that we can manage our projects. Please, please, please put this at the top of your list.

posts.author: jane.sullivan (Jane Sullivan)
posts.cookedHtml: This is an existing (and very useful feature) of SmartSheet. It’s also pretty standard for any scheduling tool; please look into prioritising this feature as this is very difficult to manage manually in a large project schedule with multiple dependencies.

posts.author: y.loyer (y)
posts.cookedHtml: We recently implemented Monday as our main project management tool and our teams NEED this feature asap to properly manage projects.

posts.author: Jessie_Plumpton (Jessie)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, We also really need his feature - we have both company wide shut downs and public holidays that need to be added schedules to see the impact

posts.author: basdebruin (Bas de Bruin)
posts.cookedHtml:
All,

Together with one of our partners we have build an app for more advanced planning. This includes entering dates or timeline, 4 dependency type (including backward planning) and lag. The app is designed to allow for holiday / blackout days. As these days are different in different parts of the world we need to define those days somewhere in the account.

Poll: what do you think is the best location inside your monday account to store your holiday / blackout days. Interested in your ideas, so we can incorporate those ideas in the app.

posts.author: Nice_Marmot (Sterling Crawford)
posts.cookedHtml: @basdebruin I’d say probably just in a bespoke board, honestly. Maybe in a “Holiday” workspace just to keep it separate from everything else.

posts.author: KelliRuaKlein (Kelli Rua Klein)
posts.cookedHtml: I agree Holiday blocking is an essential feature - this is a basic need for project management. I am disappointed not to see any responses from Monday/com Product Managers here - being a PM myself. I personally would put this feature in Admin area - where we set up the workdays since our holidays are usually company wide affecting all schedules globally. Secondly, and less important - I would put an additional feature for Resourcing for people’s personal days off.

posts.author: cmpickeral (Christina P)
posts.cookedHtml: @monday-team We also need this feature. Is there an update?

posts.cookedHtml:
There is an app called SchedulePro that let you define both the workweek and blackout dates in a view. The app is currently in the process of getting approved in the marketplace. More info can be provided by @Kimb

Below is a screenshot of the view (blocking out Thanksgiving and the Christmas week). The final layout of the view can change a litle but the funtionality stays the same.

image1101×1115 63.4 KB

posts.cookedHtml: I would like to see blackout dates on a board-by-board level, and even to the point of assigning owners to the blackout dates - Is one person from the team going on vacation? Is the entire organization closed? Just one country on holiday vs. the worldwide organization?

posts.author: Mark2 (Mark2)
posts.cookedHtml: This is also a feature that we really need.

posts.author: Bill_In_Ohio (Bill Duncan)
posts.cookedHtml: While there are external solutions to this as noted above - this is a function that should be available if monday truly wants to become a workOS. The ability to block-out dates globally is needed so that when we have dates generated (dependency + x days), it should be able to use holidays the same way as weekends. Due dates shouldn’t calculate to weekends, and due dates should also not calculate to holidays.

posts.author: Kimb (Kim Berney)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi all,
This functionality (holidays/non-working days) is now available with our app SchedulerPro!
Install a trial, here.

posts.author: WendyV (Wendy)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Kim, is scheduler pro part of Monday.com?

posts.author: Kimb (Kim Berney)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @WendyV, yes - SchedulerPro is part of monday.com in the sense that it’s an app that you can purchase on the monday.com app marketplace. Built for purpose, to power-up your monday.com account.

posts.author: Mike.Curtis (Mike Curtis)
posts.cookedHtml: So, is this function ever going to to be a basic capability of Monday.com rather than a 3rd party add on?

posts.author: Lene (Lene Twomey)
posts.cookedHtml: We would like to be able to indicate public holidays and school terms in Date column calendar view.

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Great idea @odelegacy and thanks to everyone for voting and sharing feedback. We’ve discussed implementing blackout days in Timeline/Gant views with out development team and they agree that it is important. While this feature is not immediately planned, due to other priorities and team capacity, the development team hopes to be able to provide an update in the near future.

Requests and ideas from our community, help guide us in prioritizing the features that our customers care about the most. So keep the voting and sharing ideas coming because your feedback makes a difference.

Have another idea? Submit it by opening a new discussion topic!

posts.author: npearl (Natasha Pearl)
posts.cookedHtml: This is a feature we still really need! Please consider this a priority item!

posts.author: Samantha_CF (Samantha Merrill)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello,

I am looking for the functionality to block off days on a Employee’s schedule for both personal days and “blackout days”. I envision this being something the individual would do in their Profile that would then inhibit anyone from scheduling items/subitems to them on the days they have marked as “Vacation” or “Blackout” days. The need for the vacation day scheduling is I believe self-explanatory. The “Blackout” days would be used for instances where the employee needs to be offline or has recurring monthly/weekly priorities they attend to on those days hence they cannot get to any other tasks.

For example our web programmers have offline days where they get into the weeds coding, and our SEO Specialist has 2 days a month where he does reporting and auditing of the clients we manage.

I would want them to be able to set these days in their profile as stated, then if someone tried to schedule a task on their list during one of those days it would not allow them to schedule said task. Instead the person doing the scheduling would get a note that the employee was unavailable that day, or it would automatically schedule for the next available day - something like that.

Is there something like this in place already - does anyone else have a need for this or a workaround that has been working? Let me know! Thanks!!

posts.author: jhammond (Jackie Hammond)
posts.cookedHtml: This third party App is $99/mo! This is way too much for a function that should be basic and included in monday.com software. Very disappointed

posts.author: Mike.Curtis (Mike Curtis)
posts.cookedHtml: Agreed, that’s not an option for small organisations, when it should be standard functionality.

posts.author: kolaai (alfred)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello everyone

We are currently providing early access to an app which does all these and more.
Here are some of the features of the app:

Built-in holiday checker for most countries
Ability to define holidays for users in your account
Set non-working days
Support for native monday automations
Date and timeline support
Support for teams holidays
And so much more…

To get early access to the app, please fill this form - Date Check - Early Access

Here is a demo of the app in action.

If you have any questions, you can always reach out at support@kolaai.com

posts.author: Joachim (Dessus)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be hepfull for us to see the bank holidays on a Gantt. On my side i could authorised to have people working on a bank holidays, i just need to detect the bank holidays on the Gantt y having a different colour!

posts.author: Feastie (Phil Scholefield)

There should be the ability to both flag and block holidays, visible in both Gantt charts and Timelines by highlighting/greying out.

posts.author: f.romei (Federico)
posts.cookedHtml: It is a few years people asked for this feature but yet there is no sign of any progress, is this ever going to be implemented? Much needed.

Would you please give us an update about this ? This will be very appreciate.

posts.cookedHtml:
Dear everyone,

posts.author: Samantha_CF (Samantha Merrill)
posts.cookedHtml:
I haven’t yet. Right not my team has a board they use to track their vacations so it shows up in their My Work. They assign the date they will have off to themselves with the status “vacation”. This doesn’t black out the day, obviously, but it atleast gives the rest of the team a visual reminder when someone is off. Not very efficient but its something.

I would still love to be able to blackout days so things cannot be assigned to an individual during that time.

posts.author: Kimb (Kim Berney)
posts.cookedHtml: FYI @Shamika_Khedkar

posts.author: Gbolyard (Garrick Bolyard)

Why do we need to pay extra money or add third party apps to do something that should be native to the client.

posts.author: rk42 (rami)
posts.cookedHtml:
2 years and still nothing?!!!
We need a holiday calendar for ALL major holidays, not just in the U.S. (i’m from Israel)
this is spouse to be basic! at least let us integrate outlook or google calendar in a way that imports the holidays

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Everyone,

Just an update here! We want to let you know that we are launching a new feature request process to give you more visibility into our product roadmap. As part of the new process, every quarter will discuss top voted features from the community and give you a status update. With our new process, we are providing more transparency into our future development plans with the community and are excited to share it with you. Check out All you need to know about our new Feature Request process.

As of now, our team is looking into this and it is something we are highlighting for them so they do see your comments!

posts.author: gillian_nation (Gillian Nation)
posts.cookedHtml: Any updates on this?

posts.author: MichaelDemetriou (Michael Demetriou)
posts.cookedHtml:
This should be added asap.

Monday 12113×1189 182 KB

posts.author: jensvoets (Jens)
posts.cookedHtml: please also take standard part-time days of team members into account so that part-time days can be blocked

posts.author: vzafrin (Vika Zafrin)
posts.cookedHtml: My company needs this feature too, and I note that after over two years and 290+ votes, it has not been prioritized. Third party apps are a non-starter here for a variety of reasons, and our need is pretty intricate given that we have staff worldwide with different holiday calendars. What will it take for this work to be prioritized?

posts.author: patrickparkhill (Patrick Parkhill)
posts.cookedHtml: This is an essential feature in Monday. It makes my job 10x harder. Please prioritize this on the roadmap.

posts.author: torrie (Torrie)
posts.cookedHtml: Please! We also need our dependencies to work around these dates. It really should just be the workday + holiday function in excel. The timelines need to automatically skip the OOTO dates.

posts.author: Izobelle (Isabelle)
posts.cookedHtml: Same! we use it for the human resource management - for the blocked days = vacations

posts.author: androdrigue2 (Andres Rodriguez)
posts.cookedHtml: This one is pretty basic and it’s still not there. any update or a roadmap if this ever will make it in?

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi community,

Just an update here. I know that this has been an important feature for many of you and so after speaking with our product team this feature has been added to our long term roadmap. This means that our development team is starting to work on creating this feature, but do not yet know when it will be ready. I will make sure to update it as soon as there is more information about its development process.

Thanks for all your ideas and keep sharing and voting your favorite features!

posts.author: JuliaBakhuis (Julia Bakhuis)
posts.cookedHtml:
@Julietteb
Is there already an update regarding this topic? A client of mine would like to have this feature in the workload widget app as well.

posts.author: RussellKatz (Russell Katz)
posts.cookedHtml: I see that I can now edit time off using the “Work Schedule” section of my admin setting. But the holidays/blackout days that I allocate to time off still do not impact the timeline/Gantt views. Should we anticipate this being added soon?

posts.author: QuinnC (Quinn Colter)
posts.cookedHtml: This would be very useful! And even more useful if default working days could be set at the admin level, but that this setting could be further configured at the workspace or board level.

posts.author: DaveC (Dave Carter)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi, i see you created a board for vacation/ sickness ect, is there any chance of sharing as a template, seems you have got so.ewhere with this reading your past posts. Please

posts.author: Izobelle (Isabelle)
posts.cookedHtml: I have sent you a private message let me know if you need more info

posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml: Hi everyone! The ability to hide/show weekends and first day of the week settings is in Alpha and will be fully released soon. Once it is fully released our team will be able to continue and work on adding holiday/blackout days in the timeline gant view. There is not confirmed timeline for this and so in the meantime, there are some great apps that can help you with this and you can look through the thread for suggested apps from our community.

posts.author: nigelhorne (Nigel Horne)
posts.cookedHtml: 3 years on. Any progress?

posts.author: jcullar (Joshua)
posts.cookedHtml: If you have a timeline with dependencies and company holidays how are people updating timelines to reflect the days people are out?

posts.author: helenstrafe (Helen Abbott)
posts.cookedHtml: I have multiple high level boards (with mirroring set up to show my projects in a single timeline dashboard). I then have a ‘Holiday’ project board that shows all my team’s holidays, and via mirroring again, these are reflected in a specific group on one of my high level boards. This group has a different colour so when viewed in a timeline view, the holidays stand out and are easier to see. It’s a workaround and I would prefer a native solution but this works as a temporary solution for now.

posts.author: BigWaves (Joanne)
posts.cookedHtml: @Julietteb 3.5 years since this was described as in Alpha. I’m new to Monday and relieved I only purchased month-to-month, as this is such an obvious showstopper and appears to not be seen as such by Monday? What do people use this product for, nicely formatted notes? It’s marketed as a project management tool (among other things), and bedrock of that is setting what your team’s workdays are and are not, so that dependencies know which days are available for the durations that have been set. This is not something for an app, this is core. We certainly won’t be porting any more projects into this new tool until we learn where this functionality is on the roadmap.

posts.author: kirst (Kirst)
posts.cookedHtml: Our team would also love to see this in the workload widget as well!

posts.author: EricDuncan (Eric Kozak)
posts.cookedHtml:
We’ve been waiting and using workarounds for this functionality for a very long time. We’re reassessing our Monday workflow and I am shocked this still isn’t updated. This is incredibly basic functionality for project management software. You seem to already have the bones of this feature built via non-working days, it just needs to connect with the timeline/Gantt.

Please no more AI features until this is on the immediate roadmap. It could be enough for us to switch to a different platform.

posts.author: NicoMutert (Nico Mutert)

posts.author: nataliegarcia13 (Natalie Garcia)
posts.cookedHtml: Our team has been fully on Monday for 6 months now and it is crazy this feature isn’t included as a baseline functionality. All workarounds we have tried failed and the project managers are manually moving timeline dates around any holiday or company holiday. It’s such a huge waste of time and leaves so much for error. posts.author: GanttGo (Hidai Bar-Mor)
posts.cookedHtml: We built GanttGo specifically to address gaps like this. It includes holiday/blackout day configuration, preset country holidays plus custom dates. Tasks automatically account for non-working days. Available in the marketplace. Search for GanttGo.

posts.author: GanttGo (Hidai Bar-Mor)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @suzzanecastro, GanttGo should solve your holiday blackout days in timeline problem.

posts.author: SariHoltz (Sari Holtz)

posts.author: MickaylaM (Mickayla Murray)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone! Mickayla from the community team here. I wanted to jump in with a transparent update. The product team informed me that building the “blackout days” feature is on the roadmap for this year. I know this has been a long-standing request so I wanted to share that bit of progress with you immediately.

My goal is to give you more clarity as soon as I have it, so I’ll be staying close to the team. I’ll be sure to provide an update the moment I have a specific timeline or quarter to share. Thank you for sticking with us
